name: Great Falls Community Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Great Falls Community Recreation Center in Great Falls, MT! There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Jaycee Park
description: No scheduled play.  Courts are open but play is determined by weather.  Players have went to our indoor facilities.

name: Peak Health & Wellness Center
description: Come play pickleball at Peak Health & Wellness Center in Great Falls, MT! There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights.

name: Salvation Army Gym
description: Come play pickleball at Salvation Army Gym in Great Falls, MT! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights, water, and restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.
